message:
chore: update TUI snapshots for semantic panel and header changes

Update 10 snapshots to match concurrent agent work (semantic panels,
header chips, build_header_text). Two history snapshots remain
environment-dependent (git remote state) between local and rch workers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,9 +8,9 @@ expression: artifact
 bvr | mode=Main | focus=list | issues=3/3 | filter=all | sort=default | ? help | Tab focus |
 ┌Issues [focus]──────────────────────────────┐┌Details─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

-│ > A              open        p1 Feature wo ││ F A  Feature work  (C copy id)                                         │

 │                                            ││ Created: n/a | Updated: n/a | Due: n/a  (t time-travel)                │
 │                                            ││ Closed: n/a | Labels: backend, urgent  (L label filter)                │
 │                                            ││                                                                        │
